testcase.name: TestOutage/fluent-bit-no-logs-delivered
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestOutage/fluent-bit-no-logs-delivered suite.go:313: Label filter expression: "outage and fluent-bit", test labels: [selfmonitor fluent-bit outage set-b] 2026/04/05 04:03:12 evaluating test labels: [selfmonitor fluent-bit outage set-b] suite.go:318: FIPS configuration: imagesAvailable=true, fipsMode=false (source: test override (WithOverrideFIPSMode)) reconfigure.go:20: Setting up cluster: istio=false, fips=false, experimental=false, prerequisites=true, forceFresh=false, helmValues=[], chart= reconfigure.go:135: Detected Istio state: not installed reconfigure.go:81: Helm values changed. --set experimental.enabled=false --set default.enabled=true --set nameOverride=telemetry --set manager.container.env.operateInFipsMode=false --set manager.container.env.appLogLevel=debug --wait
